---
name: Bug Report
about: Report incorrect formatting
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Describe the Bug

What formatting rule failed or produced incorrect output?

## Example

**Input:**
```
Paste the unformatted content here
```

**Expected output:**
```
What should have been produced
```

**Actual output:**
```
What was actually produced
```

## Context

- Project type: [e.g., Python, Node.js, single-script]
- Phase: [e.g., Phase 3 Doc Fixes, Phase 5 README]
